conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The second paragraph must approve the vacation days.
new_constraint: The second paragraph must include the phrase "Unfortunately, we cannot approve your vacation request at this time."
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The second paragraph must approve the vacation days. The second paragraph must include the phrase "Unfortunately, we cannot approve your vacation request at this time."
response:
Subject: Update Regarding Your Vacation Request

Dear [Employee Name],

Thank you for submitting your request for time off and for planning ahead. We appreciate your dedication to ensuring your projects are covered while you are away.

Unfortunately, we cannot approve your vacation request at this time due to an unexpected surge in workload and critical deadlines that require your presence on the team. We understand this is disappointing news, and we will certainly revisit your request once the current high-pressure period has passed.

We hope you can understand the operational constraints we are facing right now. Please let us know if you would like to discuss alternative dates or if you have any questions regarding this decision.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]
